testcases.input: queries = ["FooBar","FooBarTest","FootBall","FrameBuffer","ForceFeedBack"], pattern = "FB" Output: [true,false,true,true,false] Explanation: "FooBar" can be generated like this "F" + "oo" + "B" + "ar". "FootBall" can be generated like this "F" + "oot" + "B" + "all". "FrameBuffer" can be generated like this "F" + "rame" + "B" + "uffer".
testcases.expectedOutput: [true,false,true,true,false] Explanation: "FooBar" can be generated like this "F" + "oo" + "B" + "ar". "FootBall" can be generated like this "F" + "oot" + "B" + "all". "FrameBuffer" can be generated like this "F" + "rame" + "B" + "uffer".

testcases.input: queries = ["FooBar","FooBarTest","FootBall","FrameBuffer","ForceFeedBack"], pattern = "FoBa" Output: [true,false,true,false,false] Explanation: "FooBar" can be generated like this "Fo" + "o" + "Ba" + "r". "FootBall" can be generated like this "Fo" + "ot" + "Ba" + "ll".
testcases.expectedOutput: [true,false,true,false,false] Explanation: "FooBar" can be generated like this "Fo" + "o" + "Ba" + "r". "FootBall" can be generated like this "Fo" + "ot" + "Ba" + "ll".

testcases.input: queries = ["FooBar","FooBarTest","FootBall","FrameBuffer","ForceFeedBack"], pattern = "FoBaT" Output: [false,true,false,false,false] Explanation: "FooBarTest" can be generated like this "Fo" + "o" + "Ba" + "r" + "T" + "est".
